details: A dependency-confusion stub published under the @veertly scope (version 100.0.2, 427 bytes). Its preinstall hook runs node index.js, which sends an HTTP GET beacon to hxxp://13[.]50[.]241[.]66:8080/poc-Swisscom-Abuelkhair during install. The description claims to be an authorized research proof-of-concept, but it performs an unsolicited install-time outbound callback to a bare IP. A @veertly-scoped dependency-confusion stub (version 100.0.2) with a preinstall hook (node index.js) that fires an HTTP GET beacon to 13[.]50[.]241[.]66:8080/poc-Swisscom-Abuelkhair during npm install. The description claims to be an authorized research proof-of-concept, but the unsolicited install-time callback to a bare IP is malicious regardless of claimed intent.
